IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (32947778.pdf)
SUMMARY: Human Resources Professional with practical understanding of business needs. Areas of expertise include conflict management and employee training. Highly effective at incorporating creative leadership skills to achieve business objectives.
SKILLS: benefits, budget analysis, budgets, coaching, contract negotiations, documentation, training employees, event planning, executive management, senior management, firing, forms, functional, General Manager, graphics, hiring, human resource management, Human Resource, human resources, HR, insurance, regulatory compliance, letters, logistics, Director, managing, marketing, meetings, payroll, People Soft, personnel, policies, presentations, press releases, PR, processes, promotion, recruiting, recruitment, reporting, sales, scheduling, sound, staffing, strategic, travel arrangements, workshops

JOB TITLE: HR Manager
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: 01/2012 - 04/2015
DESCRIPTION: Planned, directed, and coordinated human resource management activities to maximize the strategic use of human resources. Maintained functions such as workers compensation, recruitment, personnel policies, and regulatory compliance.

SOURCE: 32947778.pdf
JOB TITLE: HR Coordinator/Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: 03/2011 - 11/2012
DESCRIPTION: Provided high-level support to the National Director and General Manager. Oversaw PGA TOUR golf and charity events at 31 domestic and international locations.

JOB TITLE: HR Representative
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: 02/2009 - 03/2011
DESCRIPTION: Worked with senior management to create and implement HR policies. Recruit employees; develop orientation, training, and incentive programs.

JOB TITLE: Sr. Executive Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name City, State
DATES: 01/2007 - 12/2008
DESCRIPTION: Provided a broad range of HR functions including recruiting and training employees, overseeing disciplinary action, and managing HR records.

SOURCE: 32947778.pdf
JOB TITLE: Sr. Executive Assistant
COMPANY: Company Name City, State

DESCRIPTION: Provided support to Vice Presidents of both commercial and military operations.
